# CWE-565 negative: role cookie matched to session subject (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-565-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func DeleteTenantRecord(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	roleCookie, err := r.Cookie("role")
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if roleCookie.Value != r.Header.Get("X-Role") {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	if r.Header.Get("X-Role") != "admin" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("DELETE FROM tenants WHERE id = ?", r.PathValue("id"))
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
